snippets.comment: Honestly, very difficult to understand. Minimal interaction with students, and does not explain thoroughly. Bad professor, doesn't use the textbook at all unless for homework, which makes this class more confusing. I walked in more confused everyday, and ended up going mostly to the math lab for ass

Passed the class because a kid helped me. Download google translate if you take this class and get ready to decipher. His transcripts are super funny because they are off by ALOT. Grades normally, good luck if you have to take him.
